2604.25724.title: Scalable Inference Architectures for Compound AI Systems: A Production Deployment Study
2604.25724.paper_summary: Modern enterprise AI applications increasingly rely on compound AI systems - architectures that compose multiple models, retrievers, and tools to accomplish complex tasks. Deploying such systems in production demands inference infrastructure that can efficiently serve concurrent, heterogeneous model invocations while maintaining cost-effectiveness and low latency. This paper presents a production deployment study of a modular, platform-agnostic inference architecture developed at Salesforce to support compound AI use cases including Agentforce (autonomous AI agents) and ApexGuru (AI-powered code analysis). The system integrates serverless execution, dynamic autoscaling, and MLOps pipelines to deliver consistent low-latency inference across multi-component agent workflows. We report production results demonstrating over 50% reduction in tail latency (P95), up to 3.9x throughput improvement, and 30 to 40% cost savings compared to prior static deployments. We further present a novel analysis of compound-system-specific challenges including multi-model fan-out overhead, cascading cold-start propagation, and heterogeneous scaling dynamics that emerge uniquely when serving agentic workloads. Through detailed case studies and operational lessons, we illustrate how the architecture enables compound AI systems to scale model invocations in parallel, handle bursty multi-agent workloads, and support rapid model iteration - capabilities essential for operationalizing agentic AI at enterprise scale.
2604.25724.paper_summary_zh: 現代企業的 AI 應用越來越依賴於複合 AI 系統——這是一種由多個模型、檢索器和工具組成的架構，以完成複雜任務。<lb/>在生產環境中部署這樣的系統需要推理基礎設施，能夠有效地服務同時進行的異構模型調用，同時保持成本效益和低延遲。<lb/>本文介紹了一項在 Salesforce 開發的模組化、平台無關的推理架構的生產部署研究，以支持複合 AI 用例，包括 Agentforce（自主 AI 代理）和 ApexGuru（AI 驅動的代碼分析）。<lb/>該系統整合了無伺服器執行、動態自動擴展和 MLOps 管道，以在多組件代理工作流中提供一致的低延遲推理。<lb/>我們報告了生產結果，顯示尾部延遲（P95）減少超過 50%、吞吐量提升高達 3.9 倍，與先前的靜態部署相比，成本節省達到 30% 至 40%。<lb/>我們進一步提出了一種新穎的分析，針對複合系統特有的挑戰，包括多模型擴展開銷、級聯冷啟動傳播和在服務代理工作負載時獨特出現的異構擴展動態。<lb/>通過詳細的案例研究和運營經驗，我們說明了該架構如何使複合 AI 系統能夠並行擴展模型調用、處理突發的多代理工作負載，以及支持快速的模型迭代——這些能力對於在企業規模上實現代理 AI 至關重要。
2604.25724.author: Srikanta Prasad S et.al.
